# postforme-mcp-pro

> The most complete Post for Me MCP server â€” publish, schedule, edit, delete and analyze social posts across 9 platforms from any MCP client.

postforme-mcp-pro is an MCP server that lets Claude Code, Cursor and Claude Desktop control the [Post for Me](https://www.postforme.dev/) social media API via the Model Context Protocol. It exposes 27 typed tools (one per operation) plus a `postforme_raw` escape hatch, covering Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, YouTube, X, LinkedIn, Pinterest, Bluesky and Threads.

Unlike the official Post for Me MCP (which exposes only a doc-search + sandboxed code-execution tool), every operation here is a first-class, directly-callable tool.

## Tools (27 + postforme_raw)

Social accounts:
- `list_social_accounts`: list connected accounts (filter by platform/username); source of the account ids used by posts.
- `get_social_account`: get one account by id.
- `create_social_account`: connect an account from supplied credentials.
- `update_social_account`: update stored credentials/metadata.
- `create_auth_url`: start the OAuth connect flow (returns a URL to authorize a new account).
- `disconnect_social_account`: revoke access for an account.
- `list_account_feeds`: ANALYTICS â€” recent feed + engagement metrics for an account.

Posts:
- `create_post`: create a post (publish now, schedule, or draft) across accounts/platforms.
- `publish_now`: shortcut to publish immediately.
- `schedule_post`: shortcut to schedule for an ISO-8601 time.
- `create_draft`: shortcut to save as a draft.
- `get_post`: get a post by id.
- `list_posts`: list posts (filter by status).
- `update_post`: edit caption/media/accounts/schedule/config.
- `reschedule_post`: shortcut to change a scheduled time.
- `delete_post`: delete a post.

Analytics & previews:
- `list_post_results`: ANALYTICS â€” per-platform publish outcomes (success/error, native URLs).
- `get_post_result`: one post result by id.
- `create_post_preview`: preview how a post renders per platform (non-mutating).

Media:
- `create_media_upload_url`: get a signed upload URL (2-step flow).
- `upload_media`: one-step upload of a local file or remote URL; returns a media_url to attach.

Webhooks:
- `list_webhooks`, `get_webhook`, `create_webhook`, `update_webhook`, `delete_webhook`.

Escape hatch:
- `postforme_raw`: call any /v1 endpoint directly (method, path, params, body).

## Quick install

Add to your claude_desktop_config.json or .mcp.json:
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "postforme": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "postforme-mcp-pro"],
      "env": { "POSTFORME_API_KEY": "pfm_your_key" }
    }
  }
}
```

## Environment variables

- `POSTFORME_API_KEY` (required): Post for Me API key (Dashboard â†’ Settings â†’ API Keys).
- `POSTFORME_READONLY` (optional): `true` blocks all write tools.
- `POSTFORME_BASE_URL` (optional): override API base URL for self-hosted deployments.
- `POSTFORME_DISABLE_RAW` (optional): `true` removes the postforme_raw tool.
- `POSTFORME_MEDIA_DIR` (optional): restrict upload_media local file reads to this directory.

## Known limitations

- Publishing is outward-facing (posts to real accounts) â€” confirm content before calling write tools.
- platform_configurations exposes documented common fields per platform and stays permissive for new options; use postforme_raw for anything not yet modeled.

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/helbertparanhos/postforme-mcp-pro
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/postforme-mcp-pro
- Post for Me API docs: https://api.postforme.dev/docs
